rulings.Case Title: JORGE VIDRIO VS. OSCAR BARAJAS VARGAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Response To Request For Inspection Of Premises And To Compel Inspection Of Premises
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 04, 2016 line 8. DEFENDANT OSCAR VARGAS' Motion To Compel Further Response To Request For Inspection Of Premises And To Compel Inspection Of Premises GRANTED. Inspection of the building may lead to discovery of admissible evidence, e.g. the amount of daily damages demanded in the complaint (Complaint, paragraph 17(f)). Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,010.= (501/SRB)
